title: Remote Build Management Evolution
description: Iteration history: (1) Export-WorkspacePackage existed for zip creation. (2) Show-BuildPackageOptionsForm provided UI for options. (3) Session 6 added Show-RemoteBuildConfigForm with remote path validation, build/upload, and WhatIf testing. Next: integrate with version manifest auto-generation.
notes: Evolution tracking: Build pipeline grew from simple zip to full remote path management with WhatIf testing. Consider CI/CD-like scheduled builds.
